index.title: Turjubaan Kheyraad
index.description: Resource Translator wuxuu furaa codsiyada pull ee mashiinka lagu turjumay ee faylashaada kheyraadka ee repo kasta, qaab kasta — oo ay ku shaqeyso Azure AI Translator.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — si toos ah u turjuma faylasha kheyraadka
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: Resource Translator wuxuu furaa codsiyada pull requests ee mashiinka lagu turjumay ee faylashaada kheyraadka iyadoo la adeegsanayo Azure AI Translator iyada oo loo marayo SDK-ga rasmiga ah — ma jiraan adeegyo dheeraad ah, kaliya hab socod ah.
index.workflowTitle: Turjumaaddu waa shaqo shaqo ah, ma aha hawl culus.
index.workflowBody: Ficilka ku tuur CI-gaaga hore, u jeedi Azure AI Translator, oo u daa repo-gaaga inuu hadlo luqad kasta oo aad bartilmaameedsato.

formats.title: Lix qaab fayl
formats.body: Safarrada wareega {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, iyo {restext} oo leh qaab byte-stable ah.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Ku rid fayl {configPath} ah si aad ugu darto globs, glossaries, iyo qaybaha Custom Translator.

glossary.title: Qaamuus-yaqaan
glossary.body: Ku xir magacyada sumadaha iyo erayada alaabta adigoo adeegsanaya xeerka xariiqda erayada caqliga leh ee maareeya {cpp}, {dotnet}, iyo asxaabta.

dryRun.title: Dry-run + guuldarro fudud
dryRun.body: Turjumaadaha horudhaca adigoon faylal qorin, ama khaladaad kasta oo digniin ah muujinaya inta aad ku celinayso.

outputs.title: Wax soo saarka saaxiibtinimada PR-ka
outputs.body: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, iyo {hasNewTranslations} si toos ah ugu dhex galaan create-pull-request.

sdk.title: Azure SDK Rasmiga ah
sdk.body: Waxaa lagu dhisay {azureSdk} + {corePipeline} — isku dayo toos ah oo {statusCodes} ah, HTTP gacanta lagu duubo ma jiro. {esbuild} la xiray, nadiif kormeer.

workflowPreview.body: Saddex sir, afar sadar, iyo repo-gaagu waa luqado badan marka xigta.

cta.title: Diyaar ma u tahay inaad ku degto autopilot?
cta.body: Hal furaha Azure AI Translator, hal fayl workflow. Resource Translator ayaa gacanta ku haya inta kale.

getting-started.title: Bilowga
getting-started.lede: Ku dar fayl workflow ah, u jeedi aqoonsiga Azure AI Translator, falkaasna wuxuu baadhaa repo-ga faylasha kheyraadka luqadda ilaha wuxuuna sii deyn doonaa walaalo la turjumay.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Abuur resource Azure AI Translator ah portal-ka Azure, kadibna kaydi kuwa soo socda sida siraha kaydka GitHub si workflow-ku u akhriyo:

resource.title: Commit faylka kheyraadka ilaha
resource.body: Faylasha kheyraadka waxay isticmaalaan nidaamka {namingConvention}. Tusaale ahaan, {sourceFile} waxay noqotaa {frFile}, {deFile}, iyo wixii la mid ah kadib socod.

output.title: Eeg wax soo saarka
output.body: Marka hawsha shaqada la dhammeeyo, falku wuxuu soo bandhigayaa saddex natiijo oo aad ku xiri karto sharaxaadda PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, iyo {hasNewTranslations}. Sidoo kale waxay ku qoraa dulmar Markdown bogga shaqada iyada oo loo marayo {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Tallaabooyinka xiga
nextSteps.recipes: Eeg cuntooyinka monorepos, lumaha gaarka ah, iyo qaybaha Turjumaadda Gaarka ah.

configuration.title: Qaabeynta
configuration.lede: Express waxay mar hore ugu jirtaa faylka repository config file waxayna u ogolaataa dhammaan workflow-yada inay ka dhaxlaan. Input action had iyo jeer way guuleystaan marka labadaba la bixiyo.
configuration.intro: Ka dhaaf waddada adigoo isticmaalaya input-ka {configPath} haddii aad u baahan tahay meel aan default ahayn.

fields.sourceLocale: Haddii aan la dejiyin, waxay ku noqotaa gelinta {sourceLocale}. Sidoo kale waxaa loo diray Translator sida {fromLocale} si xadhkaha gaagaaban aan si toos ah loo ogaan.
fields.toLocales: Ama array ama xarig kala soocan comma.
fields.includeExclude: Qaababka Glob oo lagu qiimeeyay waddooyinka absolute iyo kuwa la xiriira shaqada.
fields.categoryId: Qaybta Azure {customTranslatorLink} — badhka warshada/domain-kaaga (sharci, caafimaad, codka suuqgeynta, iwm). Waxaa loo diray {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Default ahaan waa {plain}. Isticmaal {html} kaliya haddii qiimaha kheyraadkaaga ay ka kooban yihiin qaybo HTML dhab ah.
fields.profanityAction: Sida loo daaweeyo erayada aceliska ah ee wax soo saarka la turjumay.
fields.profanityMarker: Kaliya macno leh marka {profanityAction} ay {marked} tahay.
fields.allowFallback: U dejisay {false} si uu u fashilmo turjumaadda marka {categoryId}-gaagu uusan lahayn deployment goob bartilmaameed ah halkii aad ku laaban lahayd moodelka guud.
fields.apiVersion: Nooca turjumaadda REST API. Default ahaan waa {version}.
fields.maxRetries: Isku dayga ugu badan ee dib-u-eegista jawaabaha HTTP ee ku meel gaarka ah ({statusCodes}). Caadi ahaan {defaultRetries}. Wadarta wicitaannada HTTP ee codsi kasta waa {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Cap (ms) hurdo kasta oo backoff ah. Default ahaan waa {defaultBackoff}. Madaxa {retryAfter} ee Azure si sax ah ayaa loo ixtiraamaa marka uu jiro; haddii kale jittered exponential backoff ayaa la isticmaalaa, oo lagu xaddiday qiimahan.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Default ahaan waa {true}. Marka la shido, tokens-ka sida {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} iyo HTML entities ayaa lagu beddelaa sentinel tokens ka hor turjumaadda kadibna dib ayaa loo soo celiyaa. Dami kaliya marka isha si ula kac ah uu u leeyahay literals qaab placeholder ah.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Qaabab regex dheeraad ah (oo aan lahayn debounders) ayaa lagu daray set-ka placeholder-ka caadiga ah, tusaale ahaan {angleToken} loogu talagalay syntax token gaar ah. Regexes-ka aan saxda ahayn waa la iska indhatiraa.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Qaababka Glob ayaa la waafajiyay furayaasha heerka parser-ka (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). Furayaasha iswaafajinta ayaa laga saaraa codsiga waxaana la gudbiyaa iyadoo qiimaha asalka ah la ilaaliyo.

steps.actionInputs: Ficilku wuxuu akhriyaa gelinta cad ee workflow-ka.
steps.config: Waxay ka shubtaa qaabka YAML ee {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Goob kasta oo la wadaago, gelinta ayaa guuleysta; haddii kale qiimaha YAML ayaa la isticmaalaa.
steps.validation: Qiimaha la isku daray waa la xaqiijiyay. Enums-ka aan saxda ahayn (tusaale, {invalidEnum}) waxay keenaan in falku si degdeg ah u fashilmo iyadoo fariin cad la helo.

tone.heading: Codka iyo warshadda, si cad
tone.body: Azure AI Translator v3 API ma laha hal badhanka codka. Laba dejin ayaa isku dara si ay kuu siiyaan inta badan xakameyn isku mid ah:
tone.industryBody: isticmaal {categoryId} si aad u tilmaamto qayb Azure {customTranslatorLink} ah oo lagu tababaray corpus-kaaga — sharci, farsamo, caafimaad, suuq-geyn, ama wax kale. Tani waa gacanta ugu xooggan ee codka, codka sumadda, iyo ereyada.
tone.surfaceBody: Isticmaal {glossaryLink} si aad si toos ah u xirto magacyada sumadaha iyo alaabta, sidoo kale isticmaal {profanityAction} si aad uga saarto erayada xun marka la beegsanayo maxallinta dhagaystayaasha da'da yar.

inputs.title: Gelinta iyo wax soo saarka
inputs.lede: Gelin kasta sidoo kale waa la aqbalaa faylka repo-ga ikhtiyaariga ah. Marka labadaba la dejiyo, gelinta ficilka ayaa guuleysta.
inputs.configurationIntro: Eeg {configurationLink} si aad u aragto schema-ga YAML iyo amarka loading-ka.

items.sourceLocale: Goobta isha (tusaale ahaan {en}) ayaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu helo faylasha kheyraadka sida {sourceGlob}. Sidoo kale waxaa loo diray Translator sida {fromLocale}.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Ka gudub {secrets}.

optionalInputs.heading: Gelinta ikhtiyaariga ah ee caadiga ah
optionalInputs.caption: Gelinta ikhtiyaariga ah ee caadiga ah

items.region: Gobolka kheyraadka turjumaadda (ka saar kheyraadka guud).
items.toLocales: Goobaha lagu turjumo. Waxay aqbashaa JSON array ({jsonArray}) ama qiimo kala soocan comma.
items.include: qaababka goolasha ee Newline; Kaliya faylasha is waafaqa ayaa la turjumaa.
items.exclude: qaababka goolasha ee Newline; faylasha la waafajiyay waa la dhaafay (lagu dabaqaa ka dib include).
items.configPath: Jidka faylka qaabeynta YAML (marka la barbar dhigo xididka workspace-ka).
items.dryRun: Markaad {true}, orodka turjumaadaha oo soo saar soo koobid, laakiin ha qorin faylal.
items.failOnError: Marka {true}, khaladaad lama filaan ah ayaa ku guuldareysta falka; Marka {false}, khaladaadku waa digniin.

translatorInputs.heading: Gelinta codsiyada turjumaadda
translatorInputs.intro: Kuwani si toos ah ayay ugu xirmaan Azure AI Translator v3 query parameters. Mid kasta waa ikhtiyaari; Translator-ka default ayaa khuseeya marka la joojiyo.
translatorInputs.caption: Gelinta codsiyada turjumaadda

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. Waxaa loo diray {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} ama {html}. Isticmaal {html} kaliya marka qiimaha kheyraadkaaga ay yihiin qaybo HTML dhab ah.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, ama {deleted}. Waxay xakameysaa sida erayada xun loo soo saaro turjumaadaha.
items.profanityMarker: {asterisk} ama {tag}. Kaliya macno leh marka {profanityAction} ay {marked} tahay.
items.allowFallback: Marka la {false}, Turjumaadku wuxuu soo celinayaa qalad halkii uu ku laaban lahaa nidaamka guud haddii {categoryId}-gaagu uusan lahayn hawlgelin goob bartilmaameed ah.

resilienceInputs.heading: Adkeysiga iyo ilaalinta meel ka hortagga
resilienceInputs.intro: Inputs-kan waxay xakameeyaan sida falku u dhaqmo marka Translator uu xaddido codsigaaga iyo sida uu u ilaaliyo placeholder tokens sida {mustache} ama {indexZero} si aan loo dhaawacin inta lagu jiro turjumaadda.
resilienceInputs.caption: Adkeysiga iyo gelinta ilaalinta meel kasta

items.maxRetries: Isku dayga ugu badan ee dib-u-eegista jawaabaha HTTP ee ku meel gaarka ah ({statusCodes}). Tirada guud ee wicitaannada HTTP ee codsi kasta waa {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Koobo (milliseconds) hurdo kasta oo backoff ah. Ficilku wuxuu xushmayaa madaxa jawaabta {retryAfter} ee Azure marka uu jiro; haddii kale waxay isticmaashaa jittered exponential backoff oo lagu xakameeyo qiimahan.
items.protectPlaceholders: Marka la {true} (default), placeholders sida {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} iyo HTML waxaa lagu beddelaa sentinel tokens ka hor turjumaadda kadibna dib ayaa loo soo celiyaa. Dami kaliya marka ishaagu si ula kac ah u jiro qoraal si toos ah u qaab placeholder ah oo la turjumo.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Regexes-ka kala soocay xariiqda cusub (aan lahayn kala soocid) ayaa lagu daray set-ka placeholder-ka caadiga ah, tusaale ahaan {angleToken} loogu talagalay naxwaha token-ka gaarka ah.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Qaababka newline-separated glob ayaa la waafajiyay furayaasha heerka parser-ka (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). Furayaasha iswaafajinta ayaa laga saaraa codsiga Turjubaanka waxaana la gudbiyaa iyadoo qiimaha asalka ah la ilaaliyo.

items.summaryTitle: Kooban kooban oo u wanaagsan cinwaanka PR-ka, tusaale ahaan {summaryExample}.
items.summaryDetails: Soo koobid qiimeyn ku habboon hay'adda PR ama warbixinta shaqada.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} marka hal ama in ka badan turjumaado cusub la sameeyay.

formats.title: Qaababka faylasha
formats.lede: Lix qaab oo kheyraad wareeg ah oo la wareegi karo. Ficilku wuxuu akhriyaa fayl kasta oo source-locale ah, wuxuu turjumaa qiimayaasha, wuxuuna qoraa walaal kasta oo bartilmaameed ah.
formats.namingConvention: Dhammaan faylasha waxay isticmaalaan nidaamka magacaabista {namingConvention}.

resx.blurb: Faylasha kheyraadka .NET ee ku saleysan XML. Waxay turjumaysaa qoraalka gudaha ee node kasta oo {dataValue} ah, iyadoo ilaalinaysa faallooyinka iyo metadata.
resx.specLabel: Microsoft Learn — Kheyraadka ku jira faylasha .resx

xliff.blurb: Dukumentiyada OASIS XLIFF 2.0. Wuxuu turjumaa {source} kasta wuxuuna natiijada ku qoraa {target}-ka la mid ah, isagoo dejiya {trgLang} deegaanka.

po.blurb: GNU gettext faylasha walxaha la qaadan karo. Wuxuu turjumaa {msgid} / {msgidPlural} kasta qaababka {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Faylasha JSON ee aan caadiga ahayn. Walxaha la isku dhex dhexeeyay waxaa la simiyaa iyadoo la adeegsanayo {delimiter} delimiter si loo turjumo, kadibna dib ayaa loo dhex geliyaa marka la soo saaro. Furayaasha dhibcaha leh ({dottedKey}) si toos ah ayaa loo ilaaliyay.

ini.blurb: Faylasha {keyValue} fudud (INI qaabka Win32 ama qaab kasta oo fidsan). Cinwaannada qaybaha iyo faallooyinka waa la ilaaliyay.

restext.blurb: Kheyraadka qoraalka Microsoft MUI — lammaane {keyValue} fidsan oo loo isticmaalo sidii saaxiib qoraal ah oo {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Dammaanad safar wareeg ah
roundTrip.body: Suite-ka tijaabada wuxuu xaqiijiyaa byte-for-byte round-tripping ee qalabka matalaya ee qaab kasta. Haddii quirk format uu jebiyo round-tripping ee codebase-kaaga, fadlan {issueLink} isticmaal sample yar.

recipes.title: Cunto karinta
recipes.lede: Qaababka caadiga ah ee turjumaadaha maraakiibta: monorepos, glossaries, qaybaha gaarka ah, dry runs, iyo kontoroolka codka.

pullRequest.heading: Fur codsi pull ah kadib orod kasta

monorepo.heading: Monorepos: turjumaadda baaxadda mid kasta oo xirmo ah

glossary.heading: Qaamuuska magacyada sumadaha iyo erayada alaabta
glossary.body: Ereyada qaamuuska waxaa loo isticmaalaa {after} turjumaad, sidaas darteed natiijada mashiinka ayaa sii haysata sumadda aad jeceshahay xitaa marka moodelku beddelo magac la mid ah.

customCategory.heading: Qaybta Turjubaan Gaar ah (warshad / domain)
customCategory.body: Tababar qayb Azure {customTranslatorLink} ah oo ku saabsan corpus qabta erayada iyo codka warshadahaaga (sharci, caafimaad, suuq-geyn, injineernimada gudaha, iwm.) oo aqoonsigeeda ku gudbi {categoryId}. Tani waa lever-ka codka ugu xooggan ee Azure bixiyo.

tone.heading: Xakamaynta codka + dib u dhac adag
tone.body: Isku dar Custom Translator {categoryId} oo leh {profanityAction} iyo {allowFallbackFalse} si aad u xoojiso cod joogto ah oo aad ku guuldareysato shaqada shaqada haddii qaybta la doortay aysan lahayn deployment mid ka mid ah goobahaaga bartilmaameedka.

dryRun.heading: Tijaabo ka hor inta aan la shidin habka shaqada
dryRun.body: Ficilku weli wuxuu soo saaraa soo koobid iyo dulmar tallaabo, laakiin faylal lama qoro. Isku dar {failOnErrorFalse} si aad u muujiso dhammaan dhibaatooyinka digniin inta aad ku dayactirayso.

faq.title: Ereyo la soo gaabiayay oo loo sameyay su'aalahu loogu weydiinta badan yahay
faq.lede: Jawaabo degdeg ah oo ku saabsan su'aalaha inta badan soo baxa marka tallaabada la qaadanayo.

azure.heading: Sidee falku ula xiriiraa Azure?
azure.body: Iyada oo loo marayo SDK-ga rasmiga ah ee {azureSdkLink} Microsoft, oo lagu daray {corePipelineLink}. Taasi waxay kuu ogolaanaysaa inaad si toos ah u isku daydo {statusCodes}, noocyada codsiyo iyo jawaab la qoray, iyo maaraynta madaxa aqoonsiga bilaash — wax walba oo horey loogu sameyn jiray wicitaan {axios} gacanta lagu duubay. Dusha ficilka dadweynaha (inputs, outputs, file outputs) waa mid aan isbeddelin.

tone.heading: Maxay mararka qaar turjumaadu u yihiin kuwo aan lahayn sumcad ama aan lahayn codka?
tone.body: Turjumaadda mashiinka waxay si caadi ah u noqotaa moodel ujeeddo guud. Saddex badhanka ayaa caawiya: {glossaryLink} loogu talagalay xeerarka adag ee la dhaafo, {customTranslatorLink} loogu talagalay moodooyinka si fiican loo hagaajiyay oo lagu tababaray codkaaga iyo ereyada, iyo {profanityAction} lagu tirtiro ama calaamadeeyo erayada aceebka ah.

duplicateFiles.heading: Sideen uga fogaadaa in faylkaas laba jeer la turjumo?
duplicateFiles.body: Ka bilow workflow-ka {paths} oo la mid ah faylasha source-locale oo kaliya, tusaale ahaan {sourceGlob}. Ficilku sidoo kale wuxuu leeyahay shaandhadhka faylka ee kicinta kasta marka {githubToken} la dejiyo, taasoo shaqada ku kooban tahay faylasha ku jira commit-kii ugu dambeeyay.

offline.heading: Ma ku hawlgelin karaa ficilka offline?
offline.body: Maya si sax ah — Azure AI Translator waa maskaxda runtime-ka. Laakiin waad ku ordi kartaa {dryRunTrue} si aad u xaqiijiso parsing iyo config adigoon u baahnayn HTTP codsi turjumaad.

node.heading: Node-kee ayuu action ku shaqeeyaa?
node.body: v3 waxay ku socotaa GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} runtime. JavaScript-ka la socday wuxuu la jaanqaadayaa Node 20, 22, iyo 24, taasoo CI tijaabiso.

dist.heading: Xaggee ka yimaadaan {distDir} la xiray?
dist.body: GitHub JS actions waxay ku soo diraan JS-kooda compiled gudaha kaydka. Workflow-ka {distBuild} wuxuu dib u dhisaa ka dib midoobid kasta si uu {mainBranch} haddii uu u leexdo, wuxuuna {distCheck} xannibaa PR-yada keena wax soo saarka duugoobay.

formats.heading: Maxaa ku saabsan qaababka kale ee kheyraadka?
formats.body: Maanta: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} haddii aad u baahan tahay mid kale — interface-ka parser-ka waa yar yahay (parse → map → apply translations → format) waxaana la soo dhaweyn karaa wax-ku-darka.

translations.title: Turjumaado
translations.lede: Boggan waxaa turjumay Resource Translator laftiisa, mar kasta oo la riixayo main, luqadaha kasta ee Azure AI Translator taageero.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Raadi luqad, koodh, ama magac hooyo...
translations.noLocales: Ma jiraan goobo la mid ah filter-kaas.

steps.source: Faylka ilaha Ingiriisiga wuxuu ku jiraa {messagesPath}.
steps.workflow: Wuxuu riixayaa taabashadaas, wuxuuna ka bilaabaa {workflowLink}, taasoo si {thisAction} uga soo horjeeda naftiisa.
steps.fanOut: Ficilku wuxuu ku fidsan yahay meel kasta oo ay taageerto Azure AI Translator (oo lagu habeeyay {configPath}) wuxuuna qoraa {messagesLocaleJson} walaal ah mid kasta oo bartilmaameed ah.
steps.pullRequest: Codsi pull ah ayaa la furay iyadoo la raacayo tarjumaadaha cusub. Isku darka ayaa dib u daabacaya boggan iyadoo kaararka la buuxiyay.

translations.poweredBy: Waxaa ku shaqeeya Resource Translator iyo Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Ka qayb qaadashada
contributing.lede: Warbixinnada khaladaadka, codsiyada astaamaha, iyo codsiyada pull waa la soo dhaweynayaa. Falka waa yar yahay si uu u noqdo mid saaxiib u ah kuwa markii ugu horreysay ka qayb qaatay.

steps.tests: Qor tijaabooyin wareeg ah oo ku saabsan qaabka fasaxa → iyo applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Xadka daboolka
coverage.body: Qaabka Jest wuxuu ku qasbaa daboolka ugu yar. Koodhka cusub waa inuu xakameeyaa weedhaha + xariiqaha ka sarreeya 78% iyo shaqooyinka ka sarreeya 90%. Ku dar qalab iyo tijaabooyin la socda isbeddelkaaga.

docsSite.heading: Goobta dukumentiyada
docsSite.body: Faylka {docsDir} waa mashruuc Astro 6 + Tailwind v4. Hal mar {npmInstall} halkaas, ka dibna {npmRunDev} tijaabada maxalliga ah. Habka {pagesWorkflow} wuxuu u diraa dukumentiyada GitHub Pages marka la mido.

changelog.title: Diiwaanka Isbeddelka
changelog.lede: Soo koobid heer sare ah oo ku saabsan sii deynta. Changelog-ka rasmiga ah ee awoodda leh wuxuu ku nool yahay CHANGELOG.md ku jira kaydka.
changelog.fullRecord: Eeg {changelogLink} si aad u aragto diiwaanka buuxa.

items.newInputs: Gelin cusub: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, iyo badhamada tarjumaha horumarsan {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, iyo {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale hadda sidoo kale waxaa loo gudbiyaa Translator as {fromLocale} si xargaha gaagaaban looma ogaanin si toos ah.
items.resilience: {label} automatic retry on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}) oo sharaf u ah Azure's {retryAfter} header — waxay ku noqotaa jittered exponential backoff marka la maqto. Waxaa la hagaajin karaa iyada oo loo marayo {maxRetries} iyo {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} calaamadaha sida {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} iyo HTML waxaa lagu duubaa sentinels ka hor turjumaadda kadibna dib ayaa loo soo celiyaa, sidaas darteed Turjubaanka wuxuu joojiyaa inuu burburiyo meelaha i18next/Mustache/Handlebars/.NET/printf. Toggle via {protectPlaceholders}; La soco {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} {noTranslatePatterns} cusub ee gelinta ayaa gebi ahaanba ka saartay furayaasha iswaafajinta codsiga Translator-ka (wuxuu ilaaliyaa qiimaha ilaha magacyada sumadda, koodhadhka khaladaadka, iwm). Waxay la jaanqaadaysaa qaababka glob ee furayaasha heerka parser-ka (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). {issue}
items.repoConfig: Qaabeynta heerka repo-ga iyada oo loo marayo {configPath}.
items.glossary: Taageerada qaamuuska, dulmar tallaabooyin oo loo marayo {coreSummary}.
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Bogga Astro + Tailwind v4 docs oo leh isbeddelada muuqaalka iyo Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} baaska WCAG 2.1 AA. Glyphs-ka logo-ga waxaa loo beddelaa waddooyin si aysan mar dambe u fashilmin midabka ka dhanka ah joojinta gradient-ka, badhanka {backToTop} ee dul sabeynaya wuxuu isticmaalaa {inert} isagoo qarsoon (halkii laga isticmaali lahaa beddelka {ariaHidden} ee ka tagay xadhigga), {formatsAstro} qaybaha ma isku dhacaan aqoonsiyada cinwaanka ee si toos ah loo abuuray, saddex kaararka deegaanka ayaa hadda muujinaya astaamaha {lang} ee BCP-47 sax ah ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), calaamadaha {documentation} calaamadaha taariikhiga ah ayaa lagu kala saarayaa sidebar iyo footer,  iyo miiska xogta ee {inputs}/{configuration} waxaa lagu soo bandhigaa qoraal akhristaha shaashadda.
items.inlineCode: {label} Docs Prose {codeElement} hadda waxay xirataa lahjada mawduuca warm/amber — taasoo ka duwan palette→accent-ka loo isticmaalo xiriiriyeyaasha iyo cinwaanada.
items.automation: Isku-darka otomaatiga ah ee Dependabot, baaritaanka CodeQL, CI matrix.
